description_long: This is a tall, rectangular freestanding banner display with a sleek metallic finish. The front face features a teal and gray logo resembling a stylized building, accompanied by the text 'Steuerkanzlei Jennifer Wagner' in a professional font. The sides are narrow and plain, emphasizing the slim profile of the structure. The rear face mirrors the front but is partially obscured by a series of horizontal slats or grooves on one side, adding a subtle decorative element. The base is slightly wider, providing stability for the upright form. The overall appearance is modern and suitable for professional or business environments.
description: A tall, metallic freestanding banner with a company logo and text, featuring a modern, slim design and subtle decorative grooves on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full logo and text clearly on a smooth metallic surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, rectangular profile with no visible markings or decorations.
description_view_2: Rear view with the logo and text partially obscured by horizontal grooves or slats on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile with a plain metallic finish.
